title: Aesthetics and stylistic strategy
body:
# strategies
- realistic faces figures done with oil sticks along side lined Egyptian art and lined hieroglyphics in collage unity...???
- brightly tiled sections where tiles themselves are the division point, some tiles possessing realistic figures alongside these lined styles tiles like these two images combined: 
![fb21772605d63af950e177dd15bf514a.jpg](/assets/posts/aesthetics-and-stylistic-strategy-202/ae389598-f6a1-48bc-91ca-55be5df68684)

![961270ccaa5f310a7de32fc77606624c.jpg](/assets/posts/aesthetics-and-stylistic-strategy-202/966050c4-0293-47fa-b585-13bda7f0c91e)

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
![d3cb0f22fe0ad6c6d97271f800837b77.jpg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ff3103b5-49da-4f8e-a756-2c0dd549a860)

Use pallet wood and burn hieroglyphics into it!
Do slats and create pieces where some in between flats have square tiles that come from recycled conglomerate collages of matching colors with meaning in between almost rows or segments
